creator: anthropic.com

evidence.text: The company is developing self-learning loops where Claude analyzes past interactions, extracts valuable knowledge, and feeds it back into their knowledge base. "If a question and answer look repeatable, we extract it as knowledge and put it into the agent to create a continuously improving system," explained Gwizdała.
